verdict_reason: The engineering layer preserves the four-link chain of seer → speaker → hearer → knower without flattening it. Shankara's reading (durvijñeya — the Self is hard to know) and Ramanuja's reading (the chain has a fragile final link) are both honestly named in the source pack and not conflated. The verse's softening function within the otherwise polemical 2.11-2.28 sequence is preserved through the engineering layer's tone — the 'pause to acknowledge a hard limit' shape is faithful to both commentators. The Kaṭha Upaniṣad cross-reference (1.2.7) cited in Prabhupada's purport is preserved in the source pack.
